articles.author: Steve Reed, Michael Marot
articles.title: 2-time NASCAR champion Kyle Busch receives tributes at Coca-Cola 600 and Indianapolis 500 - AP News
articles.description: NASCAR has honored the late Kyle Busch at the Coca-Cola 600 at Charlotte Motor Speedway. NASCAR CEO Steve O'Donnell stood with Busch's widow Samantha and their children, Brexton and Lennix, offering support. Former driver Kurt Busch and Kyle's parents also at…
articles.content: CONCORD, N.C. (AP) NASCAR CEO Steve ODonnell honored Kyle Buschs widow, Samantha, and the couples children, Brexton and Lennix, before the start of the Coca-Cola 600 on Sunday in an emotional speech.… [+3662 chars]
